values.value: External Auth Provider without registration handler

A social or OIDC Auth Provider is configured without a custom RegistrationHandlerClass. The default handler may automatically provision new Salesforce user accounts for any authenticated external identity.

Without a custom registration handler, Salesforce may auto-create user accounts when users authenticate via the social or OIDC provider. An attacker who controls an email domain could gain org access.

Implement a custom Apex registration handler class that validates the incoming identity before creating or linking accounts. The handler should enforce domain restrictions and log all provisioning events.
